subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from the Wronged One is directed towards the chosen ones of God and His loved ones who have believed in Him and His perspicuous Book, that He may draw them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم اصفیاء الله و اولیائه الذین آمنوا به و بکتابه المبین لیجذبهم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
